spectatorDisabledModal.title: Spectating is limited
spectatorDisabledModal.message: This match is in progress. To prevent cheating, live spectating is disabled, so you won't see the units. You'll be able to watch the full replay once the match ends.

leagueDescription: Your league reflects your skill level. Win games to earn progress within your league, and once you reach the top of a league, you advance to the next one. Lose too many games and you may drop down. Hover the league badge to see your progress to the next league.
noGamesYet: No games yet! Click Play to create a new one.
failedToLoadGames: Failed to load games. Please try again.
withdrawMessage: If you withdraw from this game it will count as a loss and that will lower your Elo, are you sure you want to withdraw?
randomGameInfo: For randomly generated games, the game will use the army you've created for the selected battle mode. You can view and manage your armies in the <0>Army Compositions</0>. If you haven't created any armies for that mode yet, a default army will be used.
selectGameMode: Select the game mode from the options below.
rankedTooltip: History does not remember the prudent. Check this box if you have the courage to put your Elo on the line of fire.

matchmakingQueue.inQueue: You are now in the matchmaking queue! The system is searching for another player who has selected the same settings as you.
matchmakingQueue.matchFound: Once a match is found, you will be redirected to the game.

matchmakingModeSwitchWarning: Fast and Slow configurations cannot be sent together. If you change to {{mode}}, the other configuration(s) will be reset. Do you want to proceed?
matchmakingDescription: Matchmaking mode lets you quickly join a game with random players using predefined settings.
tutorialRequired: Complete the tutorial before playing online
skipTutorialMessage: Skip the rest of the tutorial and return to the menu? You won't be asked to complete it again.
tutorialRequiredDescription: You need to finish the tutorial before you can queue for online matches.
onlyPartyLeaderCanSearch: Only the party leader can search for a match.

partySearchStatus.leaderDescription: You can search for a match. Your party members will be notified when you start searching.
partySearchStatus.memberDescription: Only the party leader can search for a match. You will be notified when they start searching.

customTimeFields.incrementHint: Seconds added after each submitted turn (0 = none)
customTimeFields.turnCapHint: Max seconds per turn (0 = no cap, slow game)
customTimeFields.deployTimeHint: Turn-0 time limit in seconds (0 = uses bank)

customDescription: Custom mode lets you set up a game with specific settings and invite friends to play.
importScenarioTooLarge: This scenario is too large to import. The maximum size is {{maxKb}} KB.

importScenarioModal.importInfo: You can import any scenario you want.
importScenarioModal.createInfo: You can even create your own scenarios in the <scenarioEditorLink/>.
importScenarioModal.createInfo2: Or explore the <0>Community Hub</0> for ready-made scenarios.

scenarioEditorTags.tutorialMessage: Not sure how to use it? Don't worry, we've got you covered! <tutorialLink>Watch the tutorial here.</tutorialLink>
scenarioEditorTags.randomGuide: Want to learn how to create random maps? Read <0>this guide</0>.
scenarioEditorTags.baleriiMessage: Players Balerii and Nytka have created their own map editor! Check out their YouTube channel to see how it works:

scenarioEditorAutosave.title: Autosaved Scenario
scenarioEditorAutosave.message: An autosaved scenario was found. Do you want to continue editing it or discard it?
scenarioEditorAutosave.name: Name: {{name}}

invalidScenarioType: You can only load preset or hybrid scenarios.

scripting.scriptWarning: Only use scripts that you understand. Unknown scripts may contain malicious code that could compromise your account, steal your data, mine cryptocurrency, or cause unexpected behavior in the game.
scripting.invalidFileType: File must be a JavaScript file (.js)
scripting.compilationFailed: Script compilation failed. Please check your JavaScript syntax.
scripting.selectBots: Select which bots should use this script:

deploymentStateMessage: This is the deployment stage. Take this turn to place your units where you want within the deployment zone. When you're finished, submit your orders to apply the placement.
removeFromSelectionTooltip: Remove from selection – click a unit to remove it
keepOnlyThese: Keep only these – pick units to keep
name: Name

networkErrorModal.title: Oops! Connection Lost
networkErrorModal.message: Seems like the connection failed. Don't worry! You can still enjoy playing offline.

needsUpdateModal.title: Update required
needsUpdateModal.message: A new version of LoB is available! Please update to the latest version to continue playing online.

reserveAmmoDescription: Unspent gold contributes to your reserve artillery ammunition, which automatically replenishes your artillery's inherent ammo as it fires. The estimated turns of fire take both reserve and unit ammo into account.
armyInvalid: This army is invalid, please modify it.

landing.message: Lines of Battle is a Napoleonic tactical game with simultaneous turns and real-time combat. Defeat human opponents with accurate troops and tactics!
landing.privacy: By starting, you agree to our <0>Privacy Policy</0>.

welcomeModal.title: Welcome to Lines of Battle 👋
welcomeModal.p1: New to Lines of Battle? Start with the tutorial to learn the core mechanics before your first battle.

submitOrdersConfirmation: Are you sure you want to submit your battle orders? Once submitted, you won't be able to go back.

battleOverview.title: Battle Overview
battleOverview.timeUnderPressureTooltip: Time under pressure is the time a team has the <0>{{percentage}}%</0> of the objectives VPs or less. The longer a team is under pressure, the more victory points they lose.

offerDrawModal.alreadyWantsDrawMessage: You are already offering a Draw. Do you want to withdraw this offer?
offerDrawModal.offerDrawMessage: If you offer a draw, this option will remain enabled until you disable it.

appleSignInFailed: Apple sign-in failed. Please try again.
offlineDescription: Practice against bots and play hotseat with friends on the same device!

premiumCurrencyLeaderboard.title: <premiumCurrency/> Leaderboard
premiumCurrencyLeaderboard.subtitle: Who has the greatest <premiumCurrency/>?
premiumCurrencyLeaderboard.description: Want to be the first? <storeLink>Go to the store</storeLink> and get <premiumCurrency/>!

hybridDescription: Hybrid maps use non-random, preset terrain, but enable players to use their own custom armies to play.

gameEndReasons.cancelled: The game was cancelled because at least one of the players didn't submit orders in the first turn.
gameEndReasons.victory: The game ended because one team achieved victory.
gameEndReasons.maxTurn: The game reached the maximum turns.
gameEndReasons.drawByAgreement: The game ended in a draw by mutual agreement.

deleteClanModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete <0>{{clanName}}</0>? All members will be removed from the coalition, and this action cannot be undone.

joinClanModal.message: Do you want to join <0>{{clanName}}</0>? Once you have sent your request, you will have to wait for one of the members to accept it. The request expires after {{expirationDays}} days.

cancelJoinRequestModal.message: Are you sure you want to cancel your join request for <0>{{clanName}}</0>?

ordersSubmittedDialog.p2: Checking for the opponent's orders in {{value}} seconds

leaveClanModal.message: Are you sure you want to leave <0>{{clanName}}</0>?

lobby.teamNoLongerAvailable: Someone else joined first. Pick again.

limitedMode.title: {{playersPerTeam}} vs {{playersPerTeam}} {{battleTypeName}}
limitedMode.createDescription: A {{title}} game will be created. The lobby is open to all players until it fills or auto-starts.
limitedMode.mapPoolDescription: One of these maps will be randomly picked for the game, weighted by the chances below.

arena.matchingWhenAvailable: You're in the lobby. We'll match you with another available player when we find one.
arena.searchingForPlayer: Searching for another player for you
arena.full: This arena is full. Try another or come back later.
arena.tooManyArenas: Too many arenas currently scheduled or active; try again later.
arena.invalidStartsAt: Start must be between now and 7 days from now
arena.joinOnlyWhenActive: You can only join active arenas; wait for it to start.
arena.activeArenaBanner: An arena is open! Join now and compete.
arena.allGamesPlayed: You've played all your games in this arena.
arena.inArenaGameModalMessage: You are currently in an arena game. Go to the game to take your turn.
arena.howArenasWork: Arenas are time-limited competitive sessions that last 24 hours. Open an arena and join when it's active to enter the lobby; you'll be matched with other players, play up to 5 games, and climb the leaderboard.
arena.ruleDurationTooltip: The total duration of the arena. Once it ends, the leaderboard is finalized.
arena.ruleMaxGamesTooltip: The maximum number of games you can play in this arena.
arena.ruleNoRepeatTooltip: You won't be matched against the same player twice in this arena.
arena.ruleDurationRemainingTooltip: The remaining time until the arena ends.
arena.rejoinQuestion: Do you want to rejoin the arena? You have {{count}} matches left.
arena.leagueBracketTooltip: Only players within this league range can join
arena.eloTooLow: Your league is too low to join this arena
arena.eloTooHigh: Your league is too high to join this arena

inSlowQueueModal.title: Game added to the queue!
inSlowQueueModal.message: Once it finds the rest of the players, the game will appear in the My Games section of Home!

matchFoundModal.title: Match found!
matchFoundModal.message: Your slow match is ready to play.

playableGamesMessage: You have games ready for your next move. Check them out now!

drawOfferedModal.title: Draw offered!
drawOfferedModal.messageSingular: {{player}} is offering a draw. Do you accept? The draw will only take effect if all players agree.
drawOfferedModal.messagePlural: {{players}} are offering a draw. Do you accept? The draw will only take effect if all players agree.

altWarning: The use of alternate accounts to farm Elo is prohibited. If detected, actions may be taken against the accounts involved.

steamBanner.title: Wishlist Lines of Battle on Steam!
steamBanner.description: Help us reach <0>{{wishlistCount}}</0> to launch the game!

offerDrawCooldownMessage: The last draw was offered a few turns ago. You may offer a new draw in {{turns}} turns.

acceptDrawModal.title: Accept Draw
acceptDrawModal.message: Are you sure you want to accept the draw?

translationsMessage: Do you want to collaborate with translations? You can do it <0>here</0>.
skirmishersInfo: Skirmishers are placed automatically depending on the number of units with skirmishers in the army and the skirmisher ratio of the battle type.
invitationCopied: Link copied! Send it to a friend.
startGameNowTooltip: Units that are not assigned to any player will be split evenly among the connected players on the same team as those units.
copyLogsInstructions: Want to report a bug? Please take a screenshot, copy the logs, and send them to Leo.

serverUpdating.title: Server Updating
serverUpdating.message: The server is currently being updated. Please try again in a few minutes.

whatsNew.title: What's New
whatsNew.p1: Check out the latest updates and features in Lines of Battle!
whatsNew.p2: Stay tuned for more updates and new features coming to Lines of Battle!
whatsNew.p3: Follow us on social media for the latest news and announcements.

partyInfoDescription: Use the friend bar to invite friends to your party. Only party leaders can invite friends.
immuneToFlankRearBonuses: Immune to flank and rear bonuses
kFactorTooltip: ELO K Factor (max rating change per ranked game)

discord.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to unlink your Discord account?
discord.authWaitMessage: Please wait while we process your Discord authorization...
discord.authErrorMessage: Discord authorization failed. Please try again.

mapGenerationError.title: Critical Map Error
mapGenerationError.message: Could not generate the map correctly. This may be due to WebGL or memory issues. Please reload the page.

chooseEraDescription: Please select the era you want to play. You can change this later in Settings.

tutorialSummary.heading: Tutorial summary
tutorialSummary.description: Each lesson covers a situation worth knowing.
tutorialSummary.allSeen: You saw every lesson the tutorial has to offer.
